content.en:
"Whoever else wants to challenge me, come up!"

Ye Tian stood with a knife in his hand and said domineeringly.

Swish!

Another His Highness entered, it was His Royal Highness of Divine Illusion, whose strength was much stronger than His Highness Mochizuki, and he was proficient in illusion, and even cultivated an illusion supernatural power.

The ordinary third-grade peak-level son of the universe didn't even want to meet His Divine Highness, because it was easy to be restrained by him.

Once you fall into the illusion power, if you can't break the illusion, if your own defense is a little worse, you will definitely be seriously injured by a blow, or even fall.

The Divine Illusion Hall came on the field and directly cast the illusion magic power - the Dream God Realm!

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian was suddenly shrouded in the Fantasy God Realm and entered the illusion of the Divine Illusion Palace.

However, at this time, Ye Tian opened the Void Eye, but he did not see through this illusion supernatural power.

"Interesting, it seems that my Void Eye level is still a little worse, but if you are a first-grade peak-level cosmic child, I may be afraid of it, but you are only a third-grade pinnacle-level cosmic child!"

Ye Tian turned on the Spatial Idol Divine Power, and the terrifying power burst out.

Click!!

The Dream God Realm was directly shattered under Ye Tian's powerful power.

Break ten thousand laws with strength, and when the power reaches a certain level, the illusion will also crumble.

As soon as the Fantasy God Realm shattered, His Highness the Divine Illusion was shocked, and before he could react next, the tip of a knife passed through his body.

It's another knife second!

His Royal Highness was also defeated!

Next, all His Highnesses tried to challenge Ye Tian, but they failed one after another, even if the Highnesses with strange talents could only block one move at most, and they would lose the second move.

Ye Tian's strength was beyond the expectations of all His Highnesses.

Finally, a second-grade pinnacle-level son of the universe appeared.

"His Highness the Soul Thorn!"

Ye Tian looked at the highness standing in front of him, who was one of the five highnesses of Bibo Lake.

"Your Highness Wanfa, I'm here to challenge you!"

His Royal Highness the Assassin said solemnly.

"Please!"

Ye Tian said.

In fact, His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul didn't have any confidence, but he had to make a move, he had to test Ye Tian's strength in order to increase the hope of victory for His Highness the Holy Heaven, otherwise all the Highnesses in the yellow-level area would be swept away by Ye Tian, and they would really lose face.

Swish!

His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul is invisible, this is a top-level stealth talent, and he has practiced a special stealth secret technique with a stealth talent, and the effect of stealth is very good.

If such a method is used in the process of duel, even if the enemy can perceive it, once it is slightly negligent, it is equivalent to taking the lead.

"It's ridiculous to be invisible in front of an arcane-level spatial talent!"

Ye Tian also immediately entered the state of spatial invisibility, which was more thorough than the invisibility of the stealth talent.

He doesn't really need to be stealthy, but he wants to beat the opponent in what he does best, so that the increase will be stronger.

Ye Tian, who had entered the state of spatial invisibility, used the Eye of Insight talent to gain insight into the traces of His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul, and immediately used the super god-level palm technique Void Palm, and hit His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul in the air.

Boom!!

His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul flew upside down from the void, and his injuries were not light.

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian's sword slashed and directly killed His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul.

"His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul has been defeated!!"

All the Highnesses present were amazed.

His Royal Highness the Soul Assassin is a second-grade peak-level son of the universe, and he was defeated so quickly, the gap in strength is too big!

"His Highness Wanfa is definitely a first-grade peak-level son of the universe, I'm afraid that only His Highness the Holy Heaven can hope to defeat the other party!" one of His Highnesses sighed.

"Your Highness the Wind Dragon, go and try the strength of His Highness Wanfa!"

His Highness the Holy Heaven transmitted the message to His Highness the Wind Dragon.

His Royal Highness the Wind Dragon nodded, his strength was slightly stronger than His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul, and his defense was very strong, unlike His Royal Highness the Assassin Soul, who only specialized in assassination techniques, once he was targeted by the enemy, it was easy to rush into the street.

Swish!

His Highness the Wind Dragon is on the field.

He is proficient in the wind system, and as soon as he enters the field, he opens the defensive wind system, and then uses the top offensive wind system power, the wind dragon power!!

Bang!!!!

A huge wind dragon that stretched for thousands of miles rushed towards Ye Tian, just like a real wind dragon, and its terrifying claws grabbed it at once, as if it was about to shatter this piece of heaven and earth.

"Slash!"

Ye Tian performed the Perfection-level Unsurpassed Sword Technique Wuxin Divine Knife Technique, smashed the Wind Dragon Divine Power with one sword, and went straight to His Royal Highness the Wind Dragon.

This sword directly broke through the defenses of His Highness the Wind Dragon, but His Highness the Wind Dragon had a god-level healing talent and a life talent, so he resisted the damage.

"The perfection-level unsurpassed sword technique is really powerful!"

His Royal Highness Wind Dragon had to admit.

Swish!

Ye Tian teleported over, the speed was too fast.

His Royal Highness the Wind Dragon merged into the Law of the Wind and prepared to dodge Ye Tian's attack.

And the ghostly sword actually slashed into the law of the wind at once, cutting His Royal Highness the Wind Dragon into two.

Under the attack of a sword, His Highness Fenglong, no matter how many means he had to save his life, he was defeated in the end!

After His Highness the Wind Dragon was defeated, he re-entered the illusory world and stood by His Highness the Holy Heaven.

"His Highness the Holy Heaven, I can't test the strength of His Highness Wanfa, he is very strong, definitely not weaker than you!" His Highness the Wind Dragon said with great solemnity.

"I continue to try, and there is nothing to lose if I lose anyway!"

His Highness Shadowless stood up and said.

His Highness Shadowless came on the field and fought with Ye Tian.

However, soon, His Highness Shadowless was defeated.

Then, His Royal Highness Yun Qiong came on the field, and he was also defeated quickly.

At this point, in the yellow-level area of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, except for His Highness the Holy Heaven, almost all the other powerful Highnesses were defeated.

After defeating so many highnesses, Ye Tian's momentum condensed to a top level, and the supreme sword heart gradually became consummated.

His supreme path is about to take shape!

"One person missing!"

Ye Tian looked at His Highness the Holy Heaven.

His Royal Highness the Holy Heaven was the most powerful in the previous Yellow Rank Region, and since the fall of the three Eternal Rank Sons of the Universe, no one could shake His Highness the Holy Heaven.

Some people even asserted that His Highness the Holy Heaven was expected to achieve the combat power of the Eternal Universe at the emperor level in the future, and his reputation was very loud.

Although Ye Tian was strong, as long as he didn't defeat His Highness the Holy Heaven for a day, he couldn't be called the strongest in the yellow-level region.

"Your Highness Wanfa, I'll be your last opponent!"

The Holy Heaven Temple stepped out next, walked in front of Ye Tian, and said in a deep voice.

Ye Tian was waiting for this moment, why wasn't he?

He could have challenged Ye Tian as the first opponent, but he didn't, but waited for Ye Tian to gather the strongest momentum and then challenge Ye Tian.

Although he is not walking the path of supreme strength, if he defeats Ye Tian, his own momentum will also reach a limit, which will also be of great help to his Dao, maybe he can take advantage of this opportunity to reach the limit of the momentum to get out of his own path in one fell swoop.

If you win, you will surpass the peak in one fell swoop.

If you lose, then it's just a quiet period of time, and it's nothing.

For His Highness the Holy Heaven, this battle will be beneficial and harmless!

In the huge battle world, the battle between Ye Tian and His Highness the Holy Heaven was about to begin, and all His Highnesses were watching this battle.

They were also very curious, who was stronger and who was weaker between Ye Tian and His Highness the Holy Heaven?

"Your Highness Wanfa, your talent is the strongest among any of the Highnesses I have ever seen, even the three Eternal Highnesses at the beginning, their growth speed is far inferior to yours. But your time to join the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race is too short, and it may be difficult to surpass me, if you are in a few decades, I may really not be your opponent!"

His Highness Shengtian not only praised Ye Tian, but also threatened that Ye Tian was not as good as him, so that his words would not only increase his momentum, but would not offend Ye Tian.

It's just that Ye Tian doesn't care about what His Highness Shengtian says at all, he only has one thought now.

Defeat His Highness the Holy Heavens!

"Let's fight!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Good!"

His Highness nodded.

Bang!!!!

The two have fought each other!

"Holy Heavenly Sword!"

A giant sword fell from the sky and sealed thousands of miles.

This blow was enough to severely damage any second-grade peak-level cosmic child, but Ye Tian turned on the Spatial Idol Divine Power and greeted the Holy Heavenly Sword with one hand.

Suddenly, the space shattered, and a terrifying shock wave swept thousands of miles.

After the first blow, Ye Tian and His Highness the Holy Heaven were evenly matched.

"Billions of sword light!"

With a wave of his hand, the giant sword turned into hundreds of millions of sword light and enveloped the heavens and the earth, blocking countless spaces.

Even if Ye Tian escaped into the space, the sword light could still penetrate through.

This is a supreme sword technique, and it has been cultivated to the perfection level by His Highness the Holy Heaven.

At this moment, Ye Tian cast another spatial supernatural power-

The !! of the Ten Thousand Realms

Boom Boom Boom !!!

A heavy enchantment was born, isolating hundreds of millions of sword lights into thousands of enchantments, and even isolating Ye Tian and His Highness the Holy Heaven into one of the enchantments.

"Thousand Realms Suppression!"

"Space confinement, condensation!"

"Heartless Divine Knife Technique, Slash!"

Ye Tian used a gate method to attack His Highness the Holy Heaven.

Of course.

His Holy Heaven His Highness also had a lot of defensive means, and they met and resisted Ye Tian's attack one by one.

The two of them were not up or down, so that the highnesses around them watched it with relish.

Suddenly.

His Royal Highness cast his handprints with both hands, and the whole person turned into a giant statue, with wings behind it, like a holy supreme deity.

"It is the Holy Light Divine Canon cultivated by His Royal Highness the Holy Heaven, this is a powerful Divine Canon second only to the Supreme Divine Canon, it is rumored that he has cultivated this Divine Canon to the Dacheng realm, and he can use the Holy Light Divine Body, and his power has skyrocketed!"

His Royal Highness Yun Qiong exclaimed.

The other Highnesses were solemn, and His Highness the Holy Heaven cast the Holy Light Divine Body, which was equivalent to fighting to the most critical moment.
